name: dispenser
description: Dispenser block base class — a $block subclass that produces $note artifacts in response to public :order requests. The verb appends to a persistent queue, returns a ticket synchronously, and lets the plug drain the queue on its own cadence; :deliver creates the note and moves it into the requester's inventory. Subclass for concrete dispenser kinds (horoscope, recipe-of-the-day, ...).

classes.description: A $note produced by a $dispenser_block. Carries back-references to the producing block and the production time so UIs can render a 'from: <block name>' chip and link back to the source.

Base class for plug-driven artifact dispensers. Public :order(request) appends a record to pending_orders and returns {order_id, queued: true, eta_hint}; the plug drains the queue and calls :deliver(order_id, body) to produce a $note in the requester's inventory. Per-requester rate-limit (rate_limit_seconds, default 60s) prevents request floods. Owner sets system_prompt as the persona/configuration handed to the plug; subclasses extend this with their own owner-tier knobs.

verbs.name: order
verbs.source: verb :order(request) rxd { if (typeof(request) != "string" || !request) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "order requires a non-empty request string", value: request }; } let limit_s = this.rate_limit_seconds; if (typeof(limit_s) != "number") { limit_s = 60; } let last = this.last_request_at; let last_ts = 0; let key = to_string(actor); if (has(last, key)) { last_ts = last[key]; } let now_ms = now(); if (limit_s > 0 && last_ts > 0 && (now_ms - last_ts) < (limit_s * 1000)) { let retry_in = limit_s - ((now_ms - last_ts) / 1000); raise { code: "E_RATE_LIMIT", message: "too many orders from this requester; try again later", value: { retry_in_seconds: retry_in, rate_limit_seconds: limit_s } }; } let next_seq = this.next_order_seq; let order_id = "ord_" + to_string(next_seq); this.next_order_seq = next_seq + 1; let entry = { order_id: order_id, requester: actor, request: request, ts: now_ms }; this.pending_orders = this.pending_orders + [entry]; let next_last = last; next_last[key] = now_ms; this.last_request_at = next_last; let here = location(this); if (here != null && isa(here, $space)) { observe_to_space(here, { type: "order_placed", source: this, block: this, order_id: order_id, requester: actor, request: request, ts: now_ms }); } try { tell(this, "order:" + order_id); } except err { } return { order_id: order_id, queued: true, ts: now_ms }; }

verbs.name: deliver
verbs.source: verb :deliver(order_id, body) rx { if (typeof(order_id) != "string" || !order_id) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "deliver requires order_id", value: order_id }; } let is_self = actor == this; let is_wiz = has_flag(actor, "wizard"); if (!is_self && !is_wiz) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the block actor (plug) or wizard can deliver", value: actor }; } let queue = this.pending_orders; let entry = null; let next = []; for item in queue { if (item["order_id"] == order_id && entry == null) { entry = item; } else { next = next + [item]; } } if (entry == null) { return { order_id: order_id, delivered: false, reason: "unknown_or_already_delivered" }; } this.pending_orders = next; let requester = entry["requester"]; let note = create($dispensed_note); note.text = [body]; note.produced_by = this; note.produced_at = now(); moveto(note, requester); let here = location(this); if (here != null && isa(here, $space)) { observe_to_space(here, { type: "delivered", source: this, block: this, order_id: order_id, note: note, requester: requester, ts: now() }); } return { order_id: order_id, delivered: true, note: note }; }

verbs.name: cancel
verbs.source: verb :cancel(order_id) rxd { if (typeof(order_id) != "string" || !order_id) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "cancel requires order_id", value: order_id }; } let queue = this.pending_orders; let entry = null; let next = []; for item in queue { if (item["order_id"] == order_id && entry == null) { entry = item; } else { next = next + [item]; } } if (entry == null) { return { order_id: order_id, canceled: false, reason: "not_pending" }; } if (actor != entry["requester"] && actor != this.owner && !has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the requester, owner, or wizard can cancel", value: actor }; } this.pending_orders = next; let here = location(this); if (here != null && isa(here, $space)) { observe_to_space(here, { type: "canceled", source: this, block: this, order_id: order_id, requester: entry["requester"], ts: now() }); } return { order_id: order_id, canceled: true }; }

verbs.name: next_pending
verbs.source: verb :next_pending() rxd { let is_self = actor == this; let is_wiz = has_flag(actor, "wizard"); if (!is_self && !is_wiz) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the block actor (plug) or wizard can read pending orders", value: actor }; } let queue = this.pending_orders; if (length(queue) == 0) { return null; } return queue[1]; }

verbs.name: status
verbs.source: verb :status(order_id) rxd { let queue = this.pending_orders; for item in queue { if (item["order_id"] == order_id) { return { state: "queued", order_id: order_id, ts: item["ts"] }; } } return { state: "unknown", order_id: order_id }; }
